    "Calibration sheet documentation reveals an unresolved zero vs. span error outside of allowable tolerances.",
    "Instrument is operating in-service with uncorrected calibration drift."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Isolate the instrument from the process.",
    "Perform a full five-point calibration check to isolate zero shift from span error.",
    "Recalibrate the instrument to align with ISA standards and site QC tolerances, or replace if sensor drift is non-linear and uncorrectable."
  ],
  "rationale": "The calibration sheet documentation (FD+DOC) indicates a systematic zero or span error that exceeds the maximum permissible error (MPE) defined by site QC and ISA standards. Operating an instrument in-service with known calibration errors compromises process control, safety, and data integrity.",
